'''dhakojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arachnotoxin|arachnotoxin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-k-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arachnotoxin|arachnotoxin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhakojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || dhækejeth || dhækejej || dhækejesh || dhækeje
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || dhakokojoth || dhakokojoj || dhakokojosh || dhakokojo
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || dhakojoth || dhakojoj || dhakojosh || dhakojo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || dhakofjofth || dhakofjofj || dhakofjofsh || dhakofjof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || dhakojotho || dhakojojo || dhakojosho || dhakojoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || dhakojoth || dhakojoj || dhakojosh || dhakojo
|-
| [[Possessive]] || dhakojothol || dhakojojol || dhakojoshol || dhakojokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || dhakojoothotho || dhakojoojojo || dhakojooshosho || dhakojooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || dhakojothon || dhakojojon || dhakojoshon || dhakojokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || dhakojothooro || dhakojojooro || dhakojoshooro || dhakojokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
